chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-1557 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A.No.6794/2014 (R/A). ------ 09.09.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------ None present except learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. It appears from the record that instant petition was instituted on 30.07.2010, whereas was dismissed for non prosecution on 27.11.2014; hence the listed application being M.A.No.6794/2014 was filed for restoration of the petition. Perusal of file reveals that the petitioner after filing of instant petition as well as listed application has disappeared and not pursued it vigilantly. We have gone through the prayer clauses as well as averments made under the petition and found that the petitioners sought payment of the dues in lieu of contract work duly assigned by the respondents, which was completed by him. It has been observed that the claim so urged by the petitioner requires evidence, for which this Court being barred by Article 212 of the Constitution, Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 is not competent. Hence in view of above legal position of the record, the instant petition is hereby dismissed alongwith the listed application. Judge Judge Manzoor
